outputs.main.sas:
# Load required libraries
library(rtables)
library(dplyr)
library(tidyr)
library(emmeans)
library(car)
library(rtf)

# Read ADADAS dataset
adadas <- readRDS("adadas.rds")
adsl <- readRDS("adsl.rds")

# Filter to Efficacy population
adsl_eff <- adsl %>% filter(EFFFL == "Y")
adadas_eff <- adadas %>% filter(USUBJID %in% adsl_eff$USUBJID)

# Prepare analysis dataset
# Get baseline values
baseline <- adadas_eff %>%
  filter(ABLFL == "Y") %>%
  select(USUBJID, BASE = AVAL)

# Get Week 24 LOCF values
week24 <- adadas_eff %>%
  filter(AVISIT == "WEEK 24" & ANL01FL == "Y") %>%
  select(USUBJID, AVAL, CHG = CHG)

# Merge datasets
analysis_data <- adsl_eff %>%
  left_join(baseline, by = "USUBJID") %>%
  left_join(week24, by = "USUBJID") %>%
  filter(!is.na(AVAL) & !is.na(BASE)) %>%
  mutate(
    TRT01PN = factor(TRT01PN, levels = c(0, 54, 81)),
    TRT01P = factor(TRT01P, levels = c("Placebo", "Xanomeline Low Dose", "Xanomeline High Dose")),
    SITEGR1 = factor(SITEGR1)
  )

# Create summary statistics function
sum_stats <- function(x) {
  n <- sum(!is.na(x))
  mean_val <- mean(x, na.rm = TRUE)
  sd_val <- sd(x, na.rm = TRUE)
  median_val <- median(x, na.rm = TRUE)
  min_val <- min(x, na.rm = TRUE)
  max_val <- max(x, na.rm = TRUE)
  c(n = n, mean = mean_val, sd = sd_val, median = median_val, min = min_val, max = max_val)
}

# Calculate summary statistics by treatment group
summaries <- list()
for (trt in c("Placebo", "Xanomeline Low Dose", "Xanomeline High Dose")) {
  trt_data <- analysis_data %>% filter(TRT01P == trt)
  
  # Baseline
  base_stats <- sum_stats(trt_data$BASE)
  summaries[[trt]]$baseline <- base_stats
  
  # Week 24
  wk24_stats <- sum_stats(trt_data$AVAL)
  summaries[[trt]]$week24 <- wk24_stats
  
  # Change from baseline
  chg_stats <- sum_stats(trt_data$CHG)
  summaries[[trt]]$change <- chg_stats
}

# ANCOVA model for dose response (continuous treatment)
analysis_data_cont <- analysis_data %>%
  mutate(TRT01PN_CONT = as.numeric(as.character(TRT01PN)))

model_cont <- lm(CHG ~ TRT01PN_CONT + SITEGR1 + BASE, data = analysis_data_cont)
anova_cont <- Anova(model_cont, type = "III")
p_dose_response <- anova_cont["TRT01PN_CONT", "Pr(>F)"]

# ANCOVA model for pairwise comparisons (categorical treatment)
model_cat <- lm(CHG ~ TRT01P + SITEGR1 + BASE, data = analysis_data)
anova_cat <- Anova(model_cat, type = "III")

# LS means and pairwise comparisons
emmeans_obj <- emmeans(model_cat, ~ TRT01P)
pairs_placebo_low <- contrast(emmeans_obj, method = "trt.vs.ctrl", ref = "Placebo")
pairs_high_low <- contrast(emmeans_obj, method = "pairwise", 
                           adjust = "none",
                           name = "Comparison")

# Extract pairwise results
# Placebo vs Low
p_placebo_low <- summary(pairs_placebo_low)$p.value[1]
diff_placebo_low <- summary(pairs_placebo_low)$estimate[1]
se_placebo_low <- summary(pairs_placebo_low)$SE[1]
ci_placebo_low <- confint(pairs_placebo_low)[1, c("lower.CL", "upper.CL")]

# Placebo vs High
p_placebo_high <- summary(pairs_placebo_low)$p.value[2]
diff_placebo_high <- summary(pairs_placebo_low)$estimate[2]
se_placebo_high <- summary(pairs_placebo_low)$SE[2]
ci_placebo_high <- confint(pairs_placebo_low)[2, c("lower.CL", "upper.CL")]

# High vs Low
p_high_low <- summary(pairs_high_low)$p.value[3]
diff_high_low <- summary(pairs_high_low)$estimate[3]
se_high_low <- summary(pairs_high_low)$SE[3]
ci_high_low <- confint(pairs_high_low)[3, c("lower.CL", "upper.CL")]

# Create RTF document
rtf <- RTF("tlf_14-3-01_primary_endpoint.rtf", width = 8.5, height = 11, font.size = 10)

# Add title
addHeader(rtf, "Table 14-3.01")
addHeader(rtf, "Primary Endpoint Analysis: ADAS Cog (11) - Change from Baseline to Week 24 - LOCF")
addHeader(rtf, "")
addHeader(rtf, "Protocol: CDISCPILOT01")
addHeader(rtf, "Population: Efficacy")
addHeader(rtf, "")

# Create table data
table_data <- matrix("", nrow = 20, ncol = 4)
table_data[1, ] <- c("", "Placebo", "Xanomeline Low Dose", "Xanomeline High Dose")
table_data[2, ] <- c("", paste0("(N=", nrow(analysis_data %>% filter(TRT01P == "Placebo")), ")"),
                     paste0("(N=", nrow(analysis_data %>% filter(TRT01P == "Xanomeline Low Dose")), ")"),
                     paste0("(N=", nrow(analysis_data %>% filter(TRT01P == "Xanomeline High Dose")), ")"))
table_data[3, ] <- c("Baseline", "", "", "")
table_data[4, ] <- c("n", summaries[["Placebo"]]$baseline["n"], 
                      summaries[["Xanomeline Low Dose"]]$baseline["n"],
                      summaries[["Xanomeline High Dose"]]$baseline["n"])
table_data[5, ] <- c("Mean (SD)", 
                      sprintf("%.2f (%.2f)", summaries[["Placebo"]]$baseline["mean"], summaries[["Placebo"]]$baseline["sd"]),
                      sprintf("%.2f (%.2f)", summaries[["Xanomeline Low Dose"]]$baseline["mean"], summaries[["Xanomeline Low Dose"]]$baseline["sd"]),
                      sprintf("%.2f (%.2f)", summaries[["Xanomeline High Dose"]]$baseline["mean"], summaries[["Xanomeline High Dose"]]$baseline["sd"]))
table_data[6, ] <- c("Median (Range)", 
                      sprintf("%.2f (%.0f;%.0f)", summaries[["Placebo"]]$baseline["median"], summaries[["Placebo"]]$baseline["min"], summaries[["Placebo"]]$baseline["max"]),
                      sprintf("%.2f (%.0f;%.0f)", summaries[["Xanomeline Low Dose"]]$baseline["median"], summaries[["Xanomeline Low Dose"]]$baseline["min"], summaries[["Xanomeline Low Dose"]]$baseline["max"]),
                      sprintf("%.2f (%.0f;%.0f)", summaries[["Xanomeline High Dose"]]$baseline["median"], summaries[["Xanomeline High Dose"]]$baseline["min"], summaries[["Xanomeline High Dose"]]$baseline["max"]))
table_data[7, ] <- c("", "", "", "")
table_data[8, ] <- c("Week 24", "", "", "")
table_data[9, ] <- c("n", summaries[["Placebo"]]$week24["n"],
                      summaries[["Xanomeline Low Dose"]]$week24["n"],
                      summaries[["Xanomeline High Dose"]]$week24["n"])
table_data[10, ] <- c("Mean (SD)",
                       sprintf("%.2f (%.2f)", summaries[["Placebo"]]$week24["mean"], summaries[["Placebo"]]$week24["sd"]),
                       sprintf("%.2f (%.2f)", summaries[["Xanomeline Low Dose"]]$week24["mean"], summaries[["Xanomeline Low Dose"]]$week24["sd"]),
                       sprintf("%.2f (%.2f)", summaries[["Xanomeline High Dose"]]$week24["mean"], summaries[["Xanomeline High Dose"]]$week24["sd"]))
table_data[11, ] <- c("Median (Range)",
                       sprintf("%.2f (%.0f;%.0f)", summaries[["Placebo"]]$week24["median"], summaries[["Placebo"]]$week24["min"], summaries[["Placebo"]]$week24["max"]),
                       sprintf("%.2f (%.0f;%.0f)", summaries[["Xanomeline Low Dose"]]$week24["median"], summaries[["Xanomeline Low Dose"]]$week24["min"], summaries[["Xanomeline Low Dose"]]$week24["max"]),
                       sprintf("%.2f (%.0f;%.0f)", summaries[["Xanomeline High Dose"]]$week24["median"], summaries[["Xanomeline High Dose"]]$week24["min"], summaries[["Xanomeline High Dose"]]$week24["max"]))
table_data[12, ] <- c("", "", "", "")
table_data[13, ] <- c("Change from Baseline", "", "", "")
table_data[14, ] <- c("n", summaries[["Placebo"]]$change["n"],
                       summaries[["Xanomeline Low Dose"]]$change["n"],
                       summaries[["Xanomeline High Dose"]]$change["n"])
table_data[15, ] <- c("Mean (SD)",
                       sprintf("%.2f (%.2f)", summaries[["Placebo"]]$change["mean"], summaries[["Placebo"]]$change["sd"]),
                       sprintf("%.2f (%.2f)", summaries[["Xanomeline Low Dose"]]$change["mean"], summaries[["Xanomeline Low Dose"]]$change["sd"]),
                       sprintf("%.2f (%.2f)", summaries[["Xanomeline High Dose"]]$change["mean"], summaries[["Xanomeline High Dose"]]$change["sd"]))
table_data[16, ] <- c("Median (Range)",
                       sprintf("%.2f (%.0f;%.0f)", summaries[["Placebo"]]$change["median"], summaries[["Placebo"]]$change["min"], summaries[["Placebo"]]$change["max"]),
                       sprintf("%.2f (%.0f;%.0f)", summaries[["Xanomeline Low Dose"]]$change["median"], summaries[["Xanomeline Low Dose"]]$change["min"], summaries[["Xanomeline Low Dose"]]$change["max"]),
                       sprintf("%.2f (%.0f;%.0f)", summaries[["Xanomeline High Dose"]]$change["median"], summaries[["Xanomeline High Dose"]]$change["min"], summaries[["Xanomeline High Dose"]]$change["max"]))
table_data[17, ] <- c("", "", "", "")
table_data[18, ] <- c("Statistical Analysis", "", "", "")
table_data[19, ] <- c("p-value (Dose Response) [1][2]", "", sprintf("%.3f", p_dose_response), sprintf("%.3f", p_dose_response))
table_data[20, ] <- c("", "", "", "")

# Add pairwise comparisons
table_data <- rbind(table_data, 
                    c("p-value (Xan - Placebo) [1][3]", "", sprintf("%.3f", p_placebo_low), sprintf("%.3f", p_placebo_high)),
                    c("Diff of LS Means (SE)", "", sprintf("%.1f (%.2f)", diff_placebo_low, se_placebo_low), sprintf("%.1f (%.2f)", diff_placebo_high, se_placebo_high)),
                    c("95% CI", "", sprintf("(%.1f; %.1f)", ci_placebo_low[1], ci_placebo_low[2]), sprintf("(%.1f; %.1f)", ci_placebo_high[1], ci_placebo_high[2])),
                    c("", "", "", ""),
                    c("p-value (Xan High - Xan Low) [1][3]", "", "", sprintf("%.3f", p_high_low)),
                    c("Diff of LS Means (SE)", "", "", sprintf("%.1f (%.2f)", diff_high_low, se_high_low)),
                    c("95% CI", "", "", sprintf("(%.1f; %.1f)", ci_high_low[1], ci_high_low[2])))

# Add table to RTF
addTable(rtf, table_data, font.size = 10, row.names = FALSE, na.zero = FALSE, 
         col.just = c("L", "C", "C", "C"),
         header.col.just = c("L", "C", "C", "C"))

# Add footnotes
addHeader(rtf, "")
addHeader(rtf, "Footnotes:")
addHeader(rtf, "[1] Based on Analysis of covariance (ANCOVA) model with treatment and site group as factors and baseline value as a covariate.")
addHeader(rtf, "[2] Test for a non-zero coefficient for treatment (dose) as a continuous variable.")
addHeader(rtf, "[3] Pairwise comparison with treatment as a categorical variable: p-values without adjustment for multiple comparisons.")
addHeader(rtf, "")
addHeader(rtf, "Abbreviations:")
addHeader(rtf, "ADAS-Cog = Alzheimer's Disease Assessment Scale - Cognitive Subscale")
addHeader(rtf, "LOCF = Last Observation Carried Forward")
addHeader(rtf, "LS = Least Squares")
addHeader(rtf, "SE = Standard Error")
addHeader(rtf, "CI = Confidence Interval")
addHeader(rtf, "")
addHeader(rtf, "Program: tlf-primary.R")
addHeader(rtf, "Source: ADADAS, ADSL")

# Write RTF file
done(rtf)

# Print completion message
cat("RTF file generated: tlf_14-3-01_primary_endpoint.rtf\n")
